fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the filled path for the specified source path and appends it to the destination builder.

params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the filled path for the specified source path after applying a matrix transform, and appends it to the destination builder.

params.matrix: The transform matrix to apply to the source path before computing the fill.
params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the portion of the filled path that intersects the specified clip rectangle and appends it to the destination builder.

params.cullRect: A rectangle used to cull the result; path segments outside this rectangle may be omitted.
params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the filled path for the specified source path at a given resolution scale and appends it to the destination builder.

params.resScale: The resolution scale used to compute hairline paths. A value of <c>1</c> is standard; higher values produce more detail.
params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the portion of the filled path that intersects the specified clip rectangle after applying a matrix transform, and appends it to the destination builder.

params.cullRect: A rectangle used to cull the result; path segments outside this rectangle may be omitted.
params.matrix: The transform matrix to apply to the source path before computing the fill.
params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Computes the portion of the filled path that intersects the specified clip rectangle at a given resolution scale and appends it to the destination builder.

params.cullRect: A rectangle used to cull the result; path segments outside this rectangle may be omitted.
params.resScale: The resolution scale used to compute hairline paths.
params.dst: The path builder to which the filled path is appended.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);
